payload.att_ck_technique: Match Legitimate Resource Name or Location

agents.name: Group mappings by detection and response set

options.payload:
=MAP_LAMBDA(
  mappings,
  LAMBDA(
    mapping,
    SET_KEY(
      mapping,
      "group_key",
      TEXT(MAP(
        MAP_LAMBDA(
          mapping.d3fend_techniques,
          LAMBDA(
            defend,
            SET_KEY(
              defend,
              "tmp_key",
              APPEND(
                defend.def_tactic,
                defend.def_technique
              )
            )
          )
        )
        |> SORT(
          %,
          "tmp_key"
        ),
        "tmp_key"
      ))
    )
  )
)
|>GROUP_BY(
  %,
  "group_key"
)
|> MAP_LAMBDA(
  KEYS(%),
  LAMBDA(
    key,
    OBJECT(
      key,
      GET(
        %,
        APPEND(
          "['",
          key,
          "']"
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
|>REVERSE(SORT(
  MAP_LAMBDA(
    %,
    LAMBDA(
      result,
      SET_KEY(
        result,
        "count",
        SIZE(FLATTEN(VALUES(result)))
      )
    )
  ),
  "count"
))
|> MAP_LAMBDA(
  %,
  LAMBDA(
    entry,
    REMOVE_KEY(
      entry,
      "count"
    )
  )
)
|> MAP_LAMBDA(
  %,
  LAMBDA(
    entry,
    OBJECT(
      APPEND(
        "SOP",
        INDEX_OF(
          %,
          entry
        )+1
      ),
      FLATTEN(VALUES(entry))
      |> MAP_LAMBDA(
        %,
        LAMBDA(
          technique,
          REMOVE_KEY(
            technique,
            "group_key"
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

=MAP_LAMBDA(
  group_mappings_by_detection_and_response_set,
  LAMBDA(
    sop,
    FLATTEN(VALUES(sop))[0].d3fend_techniques
    |> SORT(%,"def_technique")
    |> FILTER(%, LAMBDA(def, def.def_tactic!="Detect"))
    |> TEXT(MAP(%,"def_technique"))
    |> SET_KEY(sop, "tech_set", %)
    ))
|> GROUP_BY(%, "tech_set")
|> MAP_LAMBDA(
  KEYS(%),
  LAMBDA(
    key,
    OBJECT(
      key,
      GET(
        %,
        APPEND(
          "['",
          key,
          "']"
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
|> MAP_LAMBDA(
  %,
  LAMBDA(sop,
    OBJECT(
      APPEND("SOP",INDEX_OF(%,sop)+1),
      FLATTEN(VALUES(REMOVE_KEY(FLATTEN(VALUES(sop))[0],"tech_set")))
)))
